name: GolfTRK - Lenexa
about: GolfTRK - Lenexa is an indoor golf facility offering year-round practice and improvement through data-driven technology. The venue features TrackMan bays for advanced ball and club tracking, along with an exclusive PuttView augmented reality putting system that provides real-time analysis. Membership is required for independent bay reservations, while lessons and club fittings are available to both members and non-members.
why_golfers_like_it: Exclusive access to PuttView AR putting technology for data-driven practice
World-class TrackMan 4 and iO launch monitors for precise ball and club tracking
Noonan Digital Caddie platform for on-course data-driven club and aim recommendations
Director of Golf with PGA Tour and professional playing experience

food_and_drink.notes: Members are welcome to bring their own food
Members are welcome to bring their own drinks

simulator_hardware.notes: World-class ball tracking and club data
World-class ball tracking and club data

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to bring your own clubs for practice and simulator play.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, members are welcome to bring their own food and drinks. Please keep your area clean and dispose of trash.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes depends on the simulator software and pace of play, but typically ranges from 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is kid-friendly with coaching available for juniors and youth golfers.
